backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all data types (Employee, Timesheet, Shift, etc.) and in-memory Maps for the HR management system, with authorization mixin included. Contains the full backend API surface for users, employees, job postings, timesheets, shifts, PTO, and time-off requests.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature IDs to their titles, affected files, component dependencies, and test IDs for the timesheet-related features (hooks, employee page, manager page, HR page).
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary of short summaries for each frontend source file, describing the purpose and recent changes of every page, hook, layout, and context in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes (background, foreground, card, sidebar, chart colors, etc.).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA titled 'Aerotek (IU) Employee Management', mounting the app at #root and loading the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application file that configures TanStack Router with all role-based routes (HR, Manager, Employee, Supervisor), wraps the app in QueryClientProvider and ThemeProvider, and handles session-based redirects on the index route.
frontend/src/components/StatusBadge.tsx: Reusable StatusBadge component that maps status strings (pending, approved, active, hired, etc.) to styled pill badges with predefined color classes.
frontend/src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx: Auth context providing session state (with optional employeeId), sessionStorage persistence, logout, and role boolean flags (isHrAdmin, isManager, isEmployee, isSupervisor) via React context.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts: Custom hook providing login/logout functionality by calling the backend actor, mapping roles, and storing session state via AuthContext.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and persisted identity state via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for all backend data operations including employees, shifts, time-off, job postings, applicants, timesheets, and PTO.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter font, sets up Tailwind directives, defines CSS custom properties for a navy/amber corporate color palette (light and dark modes), and provides status badge utility classes.
frontend/src/layouts/EmployeeLayout.tsx: Layout component for the employee portal that renders a sliding drawer sidebar with navigation links (Dashboard, Schedule, Timesheet, Time Off) and a logout button, wrapping child routes via Outlet.
frontend/src/layouts/HRAdminLayout.tsx: Defines the HR Admin layout with a sliding drawer sidebar containing navigation links for HR-specific routes (dashboard, employees, hiring, scheduling, etc.) and a logout action.
frontend/src/layouts/ManagerLayout.tsx: Defines the Manager layout with a sliding drawer sidebar containing navigation links for manager-specific routes (dashboard, team, scheduling, timesheets, etc.) and a logout action.
frontend/src/layouts/SupervisorLayout.ts: Defines the Supervisor layout with a sticky header and a sliding drawer sidebar containing navigation links for supervisor routes (dashboard, schedules, time-off) and a logout action.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Provides shared utility functions including Tailwind class merging (cn), date/time formatting, nanosecond timestamp conversions, and a safe string helper.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/employee/EmployeeDash: Employee dashboard page displaying quick stats (upcoming shifts, pending time-off, total shifts) and a list of upcoming published shifts fetched via React Query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/employee/EmployeeSche: Displays an employee's published weekly shifts in a navigable week grid, filtering shifts by published status and rendering day-by-day schedule cards with overnight shift indicators.
frontend/src/pages/employee/EmployeeTime: Provides a form for employees to submit time off requests and displays existing requests grouped by status (pending, approved, denied) with summary counts.
Allows employees to enter daily start/end times for a selected week and submit a timesheet, while also listing previously submitted timesheets with their approval statuses.
frontend/src/pages/hr/AccountManagementP: HR admin page for creating user login accounts with role selection, form validation, and a modal-based creation flow.
frontend/src/pages/hr/AddEmployeePage.ts: HR form page for creating a new employee record along with a linked login account, including validation and manager assignment based on role.
frontend/src/pages/hr/ApplicantPipelineP: Displays a Kanban-style pipeline of applicants for a specific job posting, grouped by stage (Applied, Screening, Interview, etc.), with the ability to add new applicants and move them between stages.
frontend/src/pages/hr/CreateJobPostingPa: Form page for creating a new job posting with fields for title, department, description, and status, with validation and navigation back to the hiring list on success.
frontend/src/pages/hr/EmployeeDetailPage: Detail view for a single employee that supports inline editing of profile fields, deactivation, and deletion, with role-based access control for HR admins.
frontend/src/pages/hr/EmployeesPage.tsx: Lists all employees with search and filter controls by department and status, and allows HR admins to navigate to add a new employee or delete an existing one via a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/pages/hr/HiringPage.tsx: Hiring and recruitment page that displays job postings grouped by status (open, draft, closed) in a kanban-style column layout with applicant counts and navigation to individual posting pipelines.
frontend/src/pages/hr/HRDashboard.tsx: HR overview dashboard displaying KPI cards for active employees, open job postings, pending time-off requests, and department count, with links to the relevant sub-pages.
frontend/src/pages/hr/HRTimesheetPage.ts: HR timesheet review page that displays all timesheets with filtering/search, and allows HR to approve or deny manager-approved timesheets with a required comment for denials.
frontend/src/pages/hr/PTOBalancesPage.ts: HR page for viewing and adjusting PTO balances per employee, with a modal dialog to set balance, policy, and reason, supporting both creating and updating existing balances.
frontend/src/pages/hr/PTOPoliciesPage.ts: HR page that lists all PTO policies in a card grid with accrual rate, max carry-over, and eligible leave types, with buttons to create new policies or navigate to balance management.
Form page for creating or editing a PTO policy, handling fields for name, accrual rate, max carry-over, and a dynamic list of eligible leave types with validation and toast feedback.
frontend/src/pages/hr/SchedulingPage.tsx: HR scheduling page that displays a weekly calendar view of shifts by department, allowing HR users to add, delete, publish, and unpublish shifts via modals and query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/hr/TimeOffRequestsPag: HR page for reviewing employee time-off requests, displaying pending and processed requests in tables with approve/deny actions and a denial reason modal.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page supporting username/password authentication and a badge scanner modal that uses the browser's BarcodeDetector API or manual ID entry to authenticate employees.
frontend/src/pages/manager/ManagerAccoun: Manager page for creating new Employee or Manager login accounts via a modal form with validation, password visibility toggles, and server error handling.
frontend/src/pages/manager/ManagerDashbo: Manager dashboard showing KPI cards for active team members, scheduling, and pending time-off approvals, with navigation links to relevant sub-pages.
frontend/src/pages/manager/ManagerSchedu: Manager-facing weekly shift scheduling page that filters shifts by the manager's department, supporting shift creation, deletion, and publish/unpublish actions.
frontend/src/pages/manager/ManagerTeamPa: Displays a searchable table of all employees with their name, department, job title, start date, and status. Uses the useGetAllEmployees hook and renders skeleton loaders while fetching.
frontend/src/pages/manager/ManagerTimeOf: Manager page for reviewing time-off requests, showing pending requests with approve/deny actions and a modal for denial reasons. Uses useGetAllTimeOffRequests, useApproveTimeOffRequest, and useDenyTimeOffRequest hooks.
frontend/src/pages/manager/ManagerTimesh: Manager page for reviewing submitted timesheets, allowing approval or denial with a comment via a dialog. Splits timesheets into pending and reviewed sections using useTimesheets and useManagerReviewTimesheet hooks.
frontend/src/pages/supervisor/Supervisor: Supervisor dashboard displaying KPI cards for total employees, pending time-off requests, and total requests, with quick-action navigation buttons. Fetches data via inline useQuery hooks wrapping the actor.

Supervisor page showing a weekly calendar grid of department shifts, with a department selector and week navigation controls. Fetches shifts via useGetShiftsForDepartment and derives departments from useGetAllEmployees.
Supervisor page for reviewing employee time-off requests, allowing approval or denial (with required comment) via mutations, and displaying pending and processed requests with status badges.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to remove sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration enabling dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, extended navy and amber palettes, typography, container queries, and animation plugins.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot describing the Aerotek (IU) Employee Management HR platform, including architecture notes, role definitions, known login issues, and a list of implemented features at version 19.
